title: Lazy Sunday Chicken Stir Fry
description: A simple and flavorful chicken stir fry recipe perfect for a lazy Sunday afternoon. This dish is quick to make and requires minimal ingredients.
instructions: Heat a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add 1 tablespoon of oil and cook the chicken until browned and cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the chicken from the skillet and set aside.
Add the remaining 1 tablespoon of oil to the skillet and stir in the stir-fry seasoning.
Add the cooked rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Return the chicken to the skillet and stir in the sour sauce.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes until the sauce is bubbly and the chicken is coated.
